# Batch 2 Import Fixtures

Synthetic, non-confidential fixtures for spreadsheet-to-map import tests. These files are intentionally small except for `large-benchmark-spec.json`, which defines generated benchmark input parameters without committing a bulky table.

Coverage includes paste/TSV, comma CSV, semicolon CSV, Indonesian and international number formats, blank versus zero, duplicate targets, ambiguous and unmatched names, formula-like text, quoted delimiters/newlines, old aliases, negative values, percentages, malformed rows, and a generated benchmark spec.
